memoryArtifacts.headline: Adelaide of Burgundy (c. 1233-23 October 1273)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Adélaïde de Bourgogne於1233年出生在法國布格時，她的父親Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne20歲，母親Yolande de Dreux21歲。她於1251年7月21日與Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant在比利時布拉班特洛文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1273年10月23日在比利時福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文享年40歲，埋葬在比利時布拉班特洛文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adélaïde de Bourgogne于1233年出生在法国布格时，她的父亲Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne20岁，母亲Yolande de Dreux21岁。她于1251年7月21日与Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant在比利时布拉班特洛文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1273年10月23日在比利时福拉阿姆-布拉班特洛文享年40岁，埋葬在比利时布拉班特洛文。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Adélaïde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adélaïde de Bourgogne was born in 1233, in Burgundy, France, her father, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, was 20 and her mother, Yolande de Dreux, was 21. She married Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant on 21 July 1251, in Leuven, Brabant, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 23 October 1273, in Leuven, Flemish Brabant, Belgium, at the age of 40, and was buried in Leuven, Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adélaïde de Bourgogne est née en 1233, à Bourgogne, France, son père, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Dreux, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant le 21 juillet 1251, à Louvain, Brabant, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 octobre 1273, à Leuven, Brabant Flamand, Belgique, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Leuven, Brabant, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adélaïde de Bourgogne 1233 in Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne 20 und ihre Mutter Yolande de Dreux 21. Sie hat am 21. Juli 1251 in Leuven, Brabant, Belgien Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. Oktober 1273 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Leuven, Flämisch Brabant, Belgien und wurde in Leuven, Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adélaïde de Bourgogne è nata il nel 1233 nel Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Yolande de Dreux, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant il 21 luglio 1251, nel Leuven, Brabante, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 ottobre 1273, nel Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Belgio, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Leuven, Brabante, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Adélaïde de Bourgogneが1233年にフランスボウルゴグンで生まれた時，父Hugues IV duc de Bourgogneは20歳，母Yolande de Dreuxは21歳であった。1251年7月21日にベルギーブラバントレウベンでHendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1273年10月23日にベルギーvラアムス-ブラバントレウベンで40歳で死去し，ベルギーブラバントレウベンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adélaïde de Bourgogne(이)가 1233년 프랑스 부르고그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolande de Dreux(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1251년 7월 21일 벨기에 브라반트 레우븐에서 Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1273년 10월 23일 벨기에 블라아스-브라반트 레우븐에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 브라반트 레우븐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adélaïde de Bourgogne nasceu em 1233, em Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Dreux, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant em 21 de julho de 1251, em Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1273, em Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adélaïde de Bourgogne родилась в 1233 г. в местности бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Dreux, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant 21 июля 1251 г. в местности леувен, брабант, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 октября 1273 г. в местности леувен, влаамс-брабант, Бельгия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности леувен, брабант, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adélaïde de Bourgogne nació en 1233, en Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Yolande de Dreux, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Hendrik III 'de Zachtmoedige' van Brabant el 21 de julio de 1251, en Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1273, en Leuven, Vlaams-Brabant, Bélgica, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica.
